name: Agility Robotics
headline: Agility Robotics ROTATION CONFIRMATION at 60.9 / Established. No new material evidence dated May 16. Carry-forward: 100+ Digit units in commercial deployment with GXO Logistics and Amazon; ISO/TC 299 safety standards participation; first commercial-scale humanoid in logistics. Hyundai union warning (May 2026) about humanoid job losses adds sector-level labor displacement context but is not an Agility-specific event. No floor-conduct events. Rotation-cycle confirmation; no score change.

evidence.summary: 100+ Digit units in commercial deployment with GXO Logistics and Amazon; ISO/TC 299 safety standards participation; first commercial-scale humanoid in logistics. Carry-forward from May 13-15 rotation.
Hyundai union warning (May 2026) about humanoid job losses — sector-level labor displacement concern. Not Agility-specific.

rationale: Confirm at 60.9 / Established. Rotation-cycle confirmation; no material evidence dated May 16. Math: (3.5+3.5+3.5+3+3.5+3.5+3.5+3.5)/8 = 27.5/8 = 3.4375 → ((3.4375-1)/4)*100 = 60.9375 → 60.9.
watches: Humanoid robotics sector labor displacement trajectory (Hyundai union, IEEE survey)
Safety incident reporting in commercial deployments
boundaryWatchResolution: Boundary-adjacent (60.9 sits at edge of Functional/Established at 60/61). No movement this cycle.
disclaimer: This assessment is based on publicly available information and does not constitute a formal Compassion Benchmark Certified Assessment.
